Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First the task is to merge Log A and Log B into a single integrated event log

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The goal is to merge Log A and Log B into a single integrated event log Log A from System A contains events with timestamps based on when they are received not started and includes event types

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Log B from System B includes richer attributes like user_id resource_id and notes with timestamps that may be offset The format is timestamp event_name order_id user_id resource_id and notes providing more context than Log A

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Events are matched using order_id all labeled as Order1234 simplifying the process Timestamps must align within a 2 second tolerance and event names require semantic mapping due to differences

Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: Log A events include Order Received at 20231010T100000Z Order Validated at 20231010T100130Z and others up to Item Delivered at 20231010T102000Z All Log A events are tied to Order1234 focusing on the primary timeline with received timestamps

Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: Log B events include OrderReceived at 20231010T095958Z OrderValidation at 20231010T100129Z and others with additional details like user_id and notes All Log B events also relate to Order1234 with potential timestamp offsets noted in attributes like Payment gateway delay

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Log As Order Received at 100000Z matches Log Bs OrderReceived at 095958Z within 2 seconds Log As Order Validated at 100130Z matches Log Bs OrderValidation at 100129Z also within tolerance

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Log As Payment Processed at 100200Z and Log Bs PaymentCheck at 100205Z differ by 5 seconds exceeding the 2 second tolerance Despite the gap they likely represent the same event with Log Bs note about a payment gateway delay suggesting a close match

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Log As Item Shipped at 100500Z matches Log Bs Shipping at 100502Z within 2 seconds Log As Item Delivered at 102000Z has no match in Log B leaving it unpaired

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Log Bs Quality Check at 100300Z has no match in Log A so include it separately in the merged log Log B ends with Shipping ensuring all its events are considered for integration

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Combine timestamps choosing Log As as primary since it reflects the received timeline unless Log B provides start times
